name: SynLV
description: Submission-specific Croissant metadata for the hosted SynLV synthetic benchmark dataset. This artifact covers all 9 primary scenarios and all train/validation/test parquet files. MIMIC is grounding-only and is not redistributed as dataset rows. Hugging Face subsets: reference, missing_not_at_random_mild, missing_not_at_random_strong, missing_not_at_random_corr, missing_at_random, visitshift, visitshift_transfer, mismatch, mismatch_transfer.

recordSet.name: reference
recordSet.description: Row-level records from scenario_A/cohortseed_000/train.parquet using the release schema. This main record set is included for parser interoperability checks and sample iteration.

comment: MIMIC-IV is grounding-only and reconstruction-only for this benchmark project. Raw or row-level derived MIMIC data are not redistributed in this dataset distribution.
conditionsOfAccess: Synthetic data are public; MIMIC/eICU grounding rows are not redistributed and require credentialed access from their original providers.
